description_long: This is a tall, rectangular electric vehicle charging station with a sleek, modern design. The front face features a prominent orange lightning bolt symbol above a stylized car icon, indicating its function as an EV charger, along with a circular marking that may serve as a touchpoint or indicator. The body is primarily black with a glossy finish, and the structure appears robust and weather-resistant, suitable for outdoor urban environments. The sides and back are plain, with no visible openings or connectors, suggesting that the main interactive elements are on the front. The station is likely constructed from metal and plastic, providing both durability and a contemporary appearance. Its compact footprint allows for easy placement on sidewalks, in parking lots, or near curbs.
description: A tall, black electric vehicle charging station with a glossy finish and orange EV charging symbols on the front. The design is modern and robust, suitable for outdoor urban use.
description_view_0: Front view showing the orange lightning bolt and car icons, as well as a circular marking, all on a glossy black surface.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, narrow black surface with no visible features or markings.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely plain, flat black surface with no symbols or interactive elements.
description_view_3: Right side view, similar to the left, with a plain, narrow black surface and no visible features.
attribute_branding_or_logo: Front face features a large orange lightning bolt and car icon, centered and occupying the upper half of the station.
attribute_indicator_lights: A single circular marking on the front may function as an indicator light, likely for charging status.
